name: One Block Survival
creator: Pickaxe Studios
shortDesc: Start with a single block and expand your world through 12 biome phases. Features custom crafting, achievements, and multiplayer support.
longDesc: One Block Survival is the highest-rated one block map for Minecraft Bedrock Edition, with a {rating}-star rating across {reviewCount}+ reviews on the Minecraft Marketplace. Start on a single block floating in the void and progress through 12 themed biome phases, collecting random resources with each block break to expand your island and survive.
features: 12 Biome Phases — Plains, Underground, Winter, Ocean, Jungle, Swamp, Dungeon, Desert, Nether, Mountains, End, and Bonus
Random Resource Generation — Each block break produces a random resource from the current biome phase
Custom Crafting Recipes — Over 20 phase-specific crafting recipes for unique items
Achievement System — 40+ achievements tracking milestones and progress
Island Expansion — Your island grows as you collect resources
8-Player Multiplayer — Full co-op support, all players can break the block
20+ Hours of Content — Completing all phases and achievements
Bonus Endgame — Secret 12th phase with exclusive rewards

reviews.author: OneBlockKing
reviews.text: The best one block map I've played. The 12 phases give it way more content than other one block maps. The achievement system kept me motivated.

reviews.author: SurvivalQueen
reviews.text: Played with my brother and we loved it. Each phase felt completely different. The custom crafting recipes are a nice touch.

reviews.author: BedrockNewbie
reviews.text: First one block map I've ever played and it was amazing. 20+ hours for 830 Minecoins is a great deal.

faqs.q: What is the best one block map for Minecraft Bedrock?
faqs.a: One Block Survival by Pickaxe Studios is the highest-rated one block map on the Minecraft Marketplace with a {rating}-star rating across {reviewCount}+ reviews. It features 12 biome phases, custom crafting, 40+ achievements, and 8-player multiplayer. Available for {price} Minecoins.

faqs.q: What is a one block map in Minecraft?
faqs.a: A one block map is a survival challenge where you start on a single block in the void. Breaking it drops a random resource and the block regenerates. You use these resources to build and expand your island.

faqs.q: How long does One Block Survival take to complete?
faqs.a: Completing all 12 biome phases and achievements takes approximately 20+ hours. The Bonus phase provides unlimited endgame content.

faqs.q: Does One Block Survival work in multiplayer?
faqs.a: Yes, it supports up to 8 players in co-op. All players can break the one block and contribute to progression. Only the host needs to own the world.
